data.title: Ultragenyx Pharma grants 20,317 stock units to 17 new non-executive officers under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc., a biopharmaceutical company specializing in therapies for rare diseases, announced the awarding of 20,317 restricted stock units of its common stock to 17 non-executive officers recently hired. These grants were approved by the board's compensation committee and issued under the Ultragenyx Employment Inducement Plan on October 16, 2025. This move was considered essential in attracting new talent as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Rivalry Corp. closed third tranche of private placement, issuing 29,937,930 units at C$0.05 each, generating C$1,496,896.50 in proceeds.
data.description: Rivalry Corp. has successfully closed the third tranche of its non-brokered private placement, raising gross proceeds of C$1,496,896.50 by issuing 29,937,930 units at a price of C$0.05 per unit. Each unit includes one subordinate voting share and one share purchase warrant exercisable at C$0.10 until October 8, 2027. The proceeds will be used for corporate development and general working capital purposes. The company may conduct a final tranche of the private placement by November 15, 2025.

data.title: Talisker completes first part of private placement, raising C$18.3M.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.5%, marking an increase of 1.2% from the previous month. The total number of unemployed individuals now stands at 2.3 million. Additionally, the report highlighted that the economy experienced a 3.7% growth in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. Despite this growth, concerns about the job market linger as companies continue to struggle with the impacts of the ongoing pandemic.Experts suggest that government intervention may be necessary to address the rising unemployment rate and support struggling businesses.

data.title: Pintec Technology Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: PT) announces changes in the board of directors in Beijing on Oct. 24, 2025.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, Pintec Technology Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: PT) disclosed that its board member Mr. Chao Chen had resigned. Pintec is a prominent technology platform aiming to facilitate creative financial and digital services globally.

data.title: John Salley to host "The Best Darn Sports Show!" on OAN, broadening appeal. Scheduled to start airing on Oct. 24, 2025.
data.description: One America News (OAN) has expanded its audience reach with the launch of "THE BEST DARN SPORTS SHOW!" in San Diego on October 24, 2025. Former basketball star John Salley will be the host of this new series on OAN. The show aims to attract a wide range of viewers with its focus on sports.

data.title: Big Tobacco targets Caribbean nations before global treaty talks, urging governments to stop industry interference. CTFK President Yolonda C. Richardson addressed the issue ahead of COP11 in Geneva.
data.description: Yolonda C. Richardson, President & CEO of the Campaign for Tobacco-Free Kids, announced in Washington on October 24, 2025, that upcoming global discussions at the Eleventh Conference of the Parties (COP11) to the WHO in Geneva are set to involve representatives from nearly all nations. The event aims to address pressing issues related to tobacco control on an international scale.

data.title: Mural Oncology approved acquisition by XRA 5 Corp, a subsidiary of XOMA Royalty. Important numbers N/A.
data.description: This information is not intended for release, publication, or distribution, in whole or in part, in any jurisdiction where it would violate the relevant laws or regulations of that jurisdiction.

data.title: SEI Investments Company increases stock buyback program by $650 million, making total available authorization about $773.2 million.
data.description: In Oaks, Pennsylvania, on October 24, 2025, the Board of Directors of SEI Investments Company has given the green light to boost its stock repurchase initiative by $650 million. This move brings the total authorization under the program to roughly $773.2 million, including the previously allocated $123.2 million.

data.title: FHLB Dallas, Home Bank, Liberty Bank & Renasant Bank to donate $60,000 to NOLA Neighborhood Development Foundation.
data.description: In New Orleans, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas), Home Bank, Liberty Bank & Trust, and Renasant Bank will be awarding $60,000 in Partnership Grant Program (PGP) funds to the New Orleans Neighborhood Development Foundation (NDF). The ceremonial check presentation is scheduled for 11:00 a.m. on Tuesday, October 28, 2025. These funds aim to assist NDF in its efforts to aid low- and moderate-income families in attaining homeownership and financial stability through educational programs.
US bank deposits rose to $18.505 tln from $18.437 tln in the prior week.

data.title: Arbor Realty Trust (NYSE: ABR) to release Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 31, 2025, and host conference call at 10 AM ET.
data.description: Arbor Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: ABR) based in Uniondale, N.Y., disclosed plans to unveil its third quarter financial performance for 2025 before markets open on Friday, October 31, 2025. A conference call is set to take place at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the outcomes.

data.title: Click Holdings Limited (NAQDAQ: CLIK) reports strong revenue growth in fiscal year 2025, ended June 30. Leading HR and senior care solutions provider based in Hong Kong.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, Click Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: CLIK), a prominent provider of human resources and senior care solutions based in Hong Kong, disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal year concluded on June 30, 2025.
67.6% OF US CONSUMERS ARE NOW LIVING PAYCHECK TO PAYCHECK, ACCORDING TO A PYMNTS SURVEY.

data.title: Select Water Solutions declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.07 per share.
data.description: Today, in Gainesville, Texas, Select Water Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: WTTR), a prominent supplier of eco-friendly water and chemical solutions to the energy sector, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend. The announcement comes on Oct. 24, 2025.
UNITED STATES OF AMERICA DOWNGRADED TO AA- BY SCOPE

data.title: BeFra to pay US$0.29/share dividend on Nov 20, 2025, approved MX $200M div, approx US$0.2912/share before tax, US $0.2621 after.
data.description: Betterware de México, S.A.P.I. de C.V. (NYSE: BWMX) has announced the approval of a dividend payment of MX $200,000,000 at its recent shareholders meeting on October 21, 2025. This equates to roughly US$ 0.2912 per share prior to tax withholdings, or US$ 0.2621 per share after tax withholdings. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on November 20, 2025 to shareholders who are recorded as of a specific date.

data.title: Makarora to acquire Plymouth Industrial REIT for $2.1B.
data.description: The latest update reveals that there has been a significant decrease in the unemployment rate, dropping from 5.7% to 4.2%. This equates to a total of 2.3 million people being unemployed in the country. Additionally, the GDP growth rate has surged to 6.5%, indicating a robust economic recovery. The stock market has also seen a notable increase, with the main index rising by 8% in the past month. Inflation remains stable at 2.1%, providing a positive outlook for the economy. These positive trends suggest a strong and improving economic landscape.

data.title: Newmont achieves commercial production at Ahafo North in Ghana, following first gold pour on Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, ASX: NEM, PNGX: NEM) declared that its Ahafo North project in Afrisipakrom, Ghana has reached commercial production. This development is regarded as one of the notable mining projects in West Africa. The milestone comes after the project achieved its first gold pour on September 19, 2025. The achievement signifies the successful conclusion of a wide-ranging development initiative, showcasing the significant progress made in the region.

data.title: Enovis to discuss Q3 2025 results in webcast on Nov 6th at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Company also participating in investor conferences. Website for presentation: www.enovis.com.
data.description: Enovis™ Corporation, a leading medical technology growth company listed on the NYSE under the symbol ENOV, is set to hold an investor conference call and live webcast on November 6th, 2025 at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss their third quarter financial results. A presentation for the call will be accessible on the company's website, www.enovis.com. The earnings press release will be issued earlier that morning. In addition to the conference call, Enovis will be taking part in various investor conferences.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin stable, XRP rises due to cooler inflation. Bitcoin hits $110,643.22, Ethereum $3,915.14. 104,281 traders liquidated for $224.32M. Top losers: MYX Finance, Virtuals Protocol, Zcash.
data.description: Bitcoin maintains its value above $110,000 amidst a spike in inflation, which has reached a nine-month high but falls short of market projections. The current prices for cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin at $110,643.22, Ethereum at $3,915.14, Solana at $191.63, XRP at $2.48, Dogecoin at $0.1957, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001013. Noteworthy data reveals that 104,281 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours, resulting in a total loss of $224.32 million. In the same period, top losers in the cryptocurrency market were MYX Finance, Virtuals Protocol, and Zcash. More information is available on Benzinga.com.
